description_long: This cowshed is a rectangular, single-story structure with a pitched gable roof clad in red corrugated material. The exterior walls are constructed from light-colored wooden planks, giving it a rustic and functional appearance. The front features a large sliding barn door on one side and an open bay on the other, supported by a central wooden post, allowing easy access for livestock or equipment. The sides and rear are solid, with no visible windows or additional openings, emphasizing security and containment. The roof overhangs slightly, providing some shelter at the entrance. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing durability and ease of access for agricultural use.
description: A rectangular wooden cowshed with a red gable roof, featuring a large sliding barn door and an open bay at the front. The structure is solid and functional, with no windows and a rustic, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large sliding barn door on the left and an open bay on the right, supported by a central post.
description_view_1: End view displaying the solid wooden wall and the full length of the red gable roof, with no doors or windows visible.
description_view_2: Side view revealing the long, uninterrupted wooden plank wall beneath the red roof, with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite end view, similar to view 1, showing the solid wooden wall and the gable roof's peak.
attribute_door_style: sliding barn door, wooden construction with visible metal hardware
